final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire preset,
    input wire en,
    output reg [2:0] count
);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge preset) begin
        if (preset) begin
            count <= 3'b111;
        end else if (en) begin
            count <= count - 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
